name: Plasma
description: Chalumeau de soudure spatiale modifié en arme de guerre. Son jet de plasma brûle à 20 000 degrés. Il sourit derrière sa visière fumée.
prompt: Sci-fi scrap-punk heavy infantry wielding modified plasma welding torch as weapon, blue-white hot plasma jet spraying forward, bulky spacesuit with heat shielding and scorched patches, welding mask visor glowing blue, sparks everywhere, dark station interior, highly detailed
